info.description: API for a healthy food delivery dark kitchen. Provides nutritional tracking, recipe management, ordering, and inventory control.
info.title: Food API

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password
Creates a new user account with email and password

get.description: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier
Retrieves all addresses for the specified user

post.description: Creates a new address for the specified user

delete.description: Deletes the specified address for a user

get.description: Retrieves all notifications for the specified user

patch.description: Marks the specified notification as read

get.description: Retrieve all ingredients

post.description: Create a new ingredient with nutritional information

get.description: Retrieve all allergens
Retrieve all suppliers

delete.description: Delete an ingredient by its ID

get.description: Retrieve an ingredient by its ID

put.description: Update an existing ingredient by its ID

post.description: Associate an allergen with an ingredient
Associate a supplier with an ingredient and set price

get.description: Returns the inventory stock for all ingredients
Returns the inventory stock for a specific ingredient

put.description: Updates the inventory stock for a specific ingredient

get.description: Checks whether the requested grams of an ingredient are available in stock

post.description: Deducts a specified amount of grams from the ingredient stock

get.description: Query metrics by date range with optional key filter

post.description: Record a new daily metric entry

get.description: Get aggregated metric summary by date range

post.description: Create a new order with items
Create a new payment for an order

get.description: Get all promotional codes
Get all orders for a specific user
Get an order by its ID including order items

patch.description: Update the status of an existing order

get.description: Retrieve a list of all recipes

post.description: Create a new recipe with the given data

get.description: Retrieve a list of all menu items

post.description: Create a new menu item linked to a recipe

delete.description: Delete a recipe by its ID

get.description: Retrieve a single recipe by its ID

put.description: Update an existing recipe by its ID

get.description: Retrieve all ingredients for a specific recipe

post.description: Add a new ingredient entry to the specified recipe
post.summary: Add an ingredient to a recipe

post.description: Add a substitution for a specific ingredient in a recipe

get.description: Calculate the nutritional macros for a recipe based on its ingredients
